page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.16xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz. It features 64 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, providing 64 vCPUs. The instance is equipped with 512.0 GB of RAM, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It operates on the KVM hypervisor.

This server does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, requiring external block storage for data persistence. It provides a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation and high memory density offer a stable resource profile for memory-intensive workloads without the overhead of hyperthreading.

Given the 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and dedicated compute resources, this instance is designed for memory-intensive applications. Suitable workloads include large-scale databases, in-memory caching systems, enterprise resource planning applications, and memory-heavy data processing tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.16xlarge is an x86_64 memory-optimized server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz. It features 64 dedicated physical cores with one thread per core, delivering 64 vCPUs alongside 512.0 GB of RAM. This configuration establishes a 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, providing 8.0 GB of memory per core. The instance operates on the KVM hypervisor and delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 32 Gbps. It does not include local storage or GPU hardware, relying on network-attached storage. Qualitatively, the dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent compute performance for enterprise workloads. This server is configured for memory-intensive applications such as in-memory databases, large-scale caching layers, and enterprise resource planning systems.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.16xlarge is a memory-optimized KVM instance featuring 64 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 512 GB RAM, and 32 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized x86_64 server featuring sixty-four dedicated Intel Xeon cores and five hundred twelve gigabytes of RAM for enterprise workloads.
